title: NVIDIA’s Nemotron 3 Is... Awesome?
summary: NVIDIA released the Nemotron 3 series of models in Nano, Super, and Ultra variants. The models combine hybrid Mamba transformer, Latent Mixture of Experts, and Multi-Token Prediction architectures.
writeup: This video covers NVIDIA's release of the Nemotron 3 series, available in Nano, Super, and Ultra variants. The architecture combines a hybrid Mamba transformer design, Latent Mixture of Experts, and Multi-Token Prediction. The significance lies in how these three techniques are integrated within a single model family across three sizes.
